concept: Scheme a shooter where ammunition is actually compressed spacetime that creates localized reality distortions on impact rather than physical damage. Gravity rounds create temporary high-gravity zones pulling enemies together, while entropy ammunition accelerates time within its radius, rapidly aging affected targets. Environmental interactions produce emergent effects - firing temporal distortion rounds into electrical fields creates electromagnetic pulses, while reality fracture ammunition can reveal hidden dimensional passages. Advanced weapons allow layering multiple reality distortions to create complex effect combinations like time-looped gravity wells or causality-inverting explosion bubbles. The campaign culminates in navigating a completely shattered reality landscape created by careless weapons testing, requiring precise application of reality-stabilizing ammunition to restore coherent spacetime.
